creator: freebsd@bitter-almonds.com
text:
I have also experienced GPU hang with i915km driver ("i915 1.6.0 20200313" from "dmesg"; had installed "drm-devel-kmod" package) in X11 on window manager restart. This has been on Framework laptop with Intel i5-1135G7 CPU on -CURRENT of 20220303 snapshot & later of "main-n253773-57014f21e75" 20220313.
From recent hang ...

drmn0: GPU HANG: ecode 12:1:85dffffb, in MainThread [101934]
drmn0: Resetting rcs0 for stopped heartbeat on rsc0


Yesterday (or day before), after suspending the 'puter, it could not "resume"; had to do hard shutdown; can't say for sure if it was connected to the driver.
